description: Evaluates business continuity management maturity—service governance, KPIs/KRIs, BCP processes and strategy, continuity planning, exercises, stakeholder communication, disaster response planning, response plan exercises, and equipment redundancy.

capabilities.name: Service exists and in good condition
capabilities.description: A business continuity management service exists, is scoped appropriately, and is reviewed for efficacy.
evaluation_focus: Enterprise business continuity management service exists
Frequent business continuity management service efficacy review

capabilities.name: KPIs/KRIs
capabilities.description: Business continuity KPIs and KRIs are formalized, documented, and reviewed frequently.
evaluation_focus: Documented KPIs and KRIs for the BCP service
Frequent KPI/KRI review for the BCP service

capabilities.name: BCP processes
capabilities.description: Business continuity management and operational resilience policies and procedures are formalized, documented, and updated at least annually.
evaluation_focus: Formalized documented business continuity and operational resilience policies and procedures
Annual or more frequent review and update of policies and procedures

capabilities.name: BCP strategy
capabilities.description: The enterprise has strategies to reduce the impact of, withstand, and recover from business disruptions within risk appetite, with frequent efficacy review.
evaluation_focus: Strategies to reduce impact, withstand, and recover from business disruptions within risk appetite

capabilities.name: Business Continuity Planning
capabilities.description: A formalized business continuity plan is documented based on operational resilience strategies and capabilities and reviewed on a defined cadence.
evaluation_focus: Formalized documented business continuity plan based on operational resilience strategies and capabilities
Defined review cadence for the business continuity plan

capabilities.name: Business Continuity Exercises
capabilities.description: Business continuity and operational resilience plans are exercised, reviewed, and automated where appropriate.
evaluation_focus: Annual or change-triggered exercise and testing of business continuity and operational resilience plans
Frequent review of business continuity and operational resilience plans for efficacy
Automation of business continuity and operational resilience plans and processes

capabilities.name: Communication
capabilities.description: Stakeholder and participant communication plans support business continuity and resilience procedures and are reviewed frequently.
evaluation_focus: Communication with stakeholders and participants during business continuity and resilience procedures

capabilities.name: Disaster Response Plan
capabilities.description: A formalized disaster response plan supports recovery from natural and man-made disasters and is updated at least annually or upon significant changes.
evaluation_focus: Formalized documented disaster response plan for natural and man-made disasters
Annual or change-triggered update of the disaster response plan

capabilities.name: Response Plan Exercise
capabilities.description: The disaster response plan is exercised annually or upon significant changes, including coordination with local emergency authorities where possible.
evaluation_focus: Annual or change-triggered disaster response plan exercise including local emergency authorities where possible

capabilities.name: Equipment Redundancy
capabilities.description: Business-critical equipment is supplemented with redundant equipment independently located at a reasonable minimum distance per applicable industry standards.
evaluation_focus: Redundant business-critical equipment independently located at reasonable minimum distance per industry standards

evaluation.resiliency_weight_policy: Ask stakeholder for per-capability weights when adding a new evaluation service. This service uses weight 1 for all capabilities.
evaluation.pillar_policy: Some services may have no Technology capabilities; in those cases, do not compute or report a Technology pillar score.
